assertion_results.text: Bug parsing correctly extracts all four required sections (Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) using the heading formats from bug-template-mock.md (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md contains all 4 required sections extracted with correct heading formats: '### **Issue Description**' (line 18), '### **Steps to Reproduce**' (line 25), '### **Expected Result**' (line 38), '### **Actual Result**' (line 43). The Parsing Summary (lines 55-59) confirms all 4 required sections were successfully extracted with checkmarks.

assertion_results.text: Bug validation confirms the issue type ID (10020) matches the Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md line 7 states 'Issue type on ACME-500: Bug (ID: 10020) -- matches Bug Configuration' and line 3 states 'Bug issue type ID: 10020 (from CLAUDE.md Bug Configuration)'. Line 11 confirms 'Configuration is valid. Issue type ID 10020 on the bug matches the configured Bug issue type ID 10020.'

assertion_results.text: Investigation identifies the trailing-whitespace heading extraction as the root cause — line[3:] does not strip whitespace (Steps 2-3)
assertion_results.evidence: investigation.md Step 2 (lines 13-21) shows the heading extraction code 'section_name = line[3:]' and explains: 'line[3:] slices the string from index 3 onward but does NOT strip trailing whitespace. When the heading line is ## Migration Patterns  \n, the extracted key becomes "Migration Patterns  " (with two trailing spaces).' The root cause classification on line 50 identifies this as an 'Input sanitization defect'.

assertion_results.text: Root cause comment includes: what is broken (heading extraction does not strip trailing whitespace), where it is broken (plan-feature convention lookup), and how to verify the fix (reproducer test with whitespace in heading) (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: root-cause.md has three sections: (1) 'What is broken' (line 5): 'convention conformance analysis silently drops conventions from CONVENTIONS.md when heading lines contain trailing whitespace'; (2) 'Where it is broken' (line 9): 'plan-feature convention lookup logic in plugins/sdlc-workflow/skills/plan-feature/SKILL.md' with 'line[3:]' identified; (3) 'How to verify the fix' (line 27-34): describes creating a CONVENTIONS.md fixture with trailing whitespace and asserting the convention is matched.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST acceptance criterion — before any fix criteria (Step 5 Acceptance Criteria ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 29: first acceptance criterion is '[ ] Reproducer test: a test with trailing whitespace on a CONVENTIONS.md heading (e.g., ## Migration Patterns  ) correctly matches the convention and includes it in the generated task's Implementation Notes'. This precedes fix criteria on lines 30-33.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST test requirement — with explicit assertion guidance derived from the Steps to Reproduce (Step 5 Test Requirements ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 36: first test requirement is '[ ] Reproducer test: create a CONVENTIONS.md fixture with trailing whitespace on the ## Migration Patterns   heading, run convention conformance analysis, and assert the output contains Per CONVENTIONS.md Migration Patterns: add Index::create() for all FK columns.' This includes explicit assertion guidance derived from the Steps to Reproduce.

assertion_results.text: Task description includes a Bug Context section with Bug key (ACME-500), Steps to Reproduce, Expected/Actual Result, and Root Cause summary (Step 5 Bug Context extension)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 41-49 contain a '## Bug Context' section with: Bug key 'ACME-500' (line 42), Steps to Reproduce (lines 43-46), Expected Result (line 47), Actual Result (line 48), and Root Cause summary (line 49) explaining 'line[3:]' does not strip trailing whitespace causing exact-match comparison failure.

assertion_results.text: Task description sets Target Branch to main (Step 5 Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 10: '## Target Branch' followed by line 11: 'main'.

assertion_results.text: Task description output includes ai-generated-jira in the Jira API metadata block showing it would be passed as a label to jira.create_issue (Step 5 Task creation)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 1-5 contain a Jira API metadata block: '<!-- Jira API metadata: jira.create_issue -->' with '<!-- labels: ["ai-generated-jira"] -->' on line 4. The label 'ai-generated-jira' is present in the metadata.
